t.role: Full Stack Developer · Java / Spring Boot / Angular
t.hero_blurb: I build secure, large-scale enterprise applications — from dynamic workflow engines to government service portals — across the full Java & Angular stack.
t.term_focus: secure microservices · workflow orchestration · clean UIs
t.about_title: Engineering reliable backends and clean Angular front-ends.
t.about_p1: I’m a full-stack engineer based in Tunis, specialising in the Java / Spring Boot ecosystem and Angular. Over the past three years I’ve shipped microservice platforms for government, insurance and banking clients — systems where security, scalability and correctness are non-negotiable.
t.about_p2: My work spans dynamic workflow orchestration with Temporal, identity and access management with Keycloak, batch processing, and event-driven architectures on Kafka — delivered with a strong DevOps and code-quality discipline.
t.work_sub: Projects delivered across consulting, government and finance.
t.skills_sub: The tools I reach for, grouped by domain.
t.contact_sub: Open to full-stack and backend roles. Reach out — I usually reply within a day.
t.footer: Designed & built by Mohamed Ben Rabah

bullets: Designed and built a centralised, multi-tenant role-based access control (RBAC) system with fine-grained roles, permissions and entitlements.
Developed a reusable RBAC SDK — JWT role conversion, cached permission resolution and Spring Security auto-configuration — integrated across the back-end services.
Integrated Keycloak in multi-realm mode (JWT) and built a custom Event Listener SPI to synchronise user events.
Hardened application security with account lockout and a full user-invitation lifecycle.
Built a dynamic workflow engine enabling graphical modelling of business processes.
Implemented configurable per-step dynamic forms with drag-and-drop.
Orchestrated and executed workflows with Temporal, monitored via Temporal UI.
Integrated external REST APIs for cross-service interoperability at each workflow step.
Handled role-based security and authentication with Keycloak.

experiences.project: E-consulat — Digitising consular services · Tunisian Ministry of Foreign Affairs
bullets: Developed and maintained a document-management back office for the Tunisian diaspora.
Designed an online consular services portal: appointments, administrative requests, case tracking.
Integrated electronic document signing via Digigo, connected to the civil registry system.
Implemented security and authentication mechanisms with Keycloak.
Built a mass-notification module based on batch processing for bulk communications.
Built a web application for online ECA insurance subscriptions.
Created a back office to track and process requests through a CRM.
Monitored and analysed user traffic with Google Analytics.
Developed a web application for a financing process within an e-banking platform.
